title: LLM-Powered Product Features
description: Integrated OpenAI API into production web applications for content generation, smart search, and user-facing AI assistants.
items: Built prompt pipelines with structured outputs and error handling for reliable LLM responses
Designed backend services to manage API rate limits, caching, and cost tracking
Created admin tools for monitoring AI workflow performance and usage metrics

title: AI Workflow Automation
description: Developed automation systems that combine API integrations, scheduled jobs, and AI agents for business process efficiency.
items: Automated document processing and data extraction workflows using LLM integrations
Built webhook-driven pipelines connecting third-party services with AI processing steps
Implemented queue-based job processing for async AI task execution

title: Backend AI Services
description: Architected backend services that expose AI capabilities through clean REST APIs for frontend and mobile clients.
items: Designed API contracts for AI features with versioning and authentication
Implemented streaming responses for real-time AI chat interfaces
Built fallback and retry logic for production-grade AI service reliability
